CatalogueDocument.docs: New top-level catalogue document schema. Fields: schema_version (u32), crate_name (CrateName), layer (LayerId), types (BTreeMap<TypeName,TypeEntry>), traits (BTreeMap<TraitName,TraitEntry>), functions (BTreeMap<FunctionPath,FunctionEntry>). 1 file = 1 crate = 1 layer (ADR 1 D1 / D6).

CrateName.docs: Newtype around Identifier for crate names (ADR 1 D5).

DataRole.docs: Role enum for TypeEntry (struct / enum / type alias). 13 values (ADR 1 D2).

ContractRole.docs: Role enum for TraitEntry. 3 values (ADR 1 D2).

ExtendedCrate.docs: TypeGraph A / S: rustdoc_types::Crate extended with per-Item action (ADR 2 D2).

FieldDecl.docs: Struct field declaration: name (FieldName) and type (TypeRef) (ADR 1 D7).

FieldName.docs: Newtype around Identifier for struct field names (ADR 1 D5).

FunctionName.docs: Newtype around Identifier for function names (ADR 1 D5).

FunctionPath.docs: Full-path key for FunctionEntry BTreeMap (ADR 1 D5 / D11).

FunctionRole.docs: Role enum for FunctionEntry. 2 values (ADR 1 D2).

GenericArgsError.docs: Validation error for TraitImplDeclV2::new_with_generic_args. Rejects empty/whitespace-only strings, strings that start with `<` (already-bracketed form), and strings with unbalanced or misordered angle brackets.

Identifier.docs: Common base newtype for Rust identifier validation (ADR 1 D5).

IdentifierError.docs: Error type for Identifier and all newtype wrappers around it (ADR 1 D5).

ItemAction.docs: Action for each catalogue entry. 4 values (ADR 1 D4).

MethodGenericParam.docs: A single generic type parameter on a method or associated function. Used to encode APIT desugaring for A-codec (ADR 2 D13).

MethodDeclaration.docs: Method declaration with SelfReceiver enum for receiver and optional docs (ADR 1 D8 / D9 / D13).

MethodName.docs: Newtype around Identifier for method names (ADR 1 D5).

ModulePath.docs: Newtype wrapping Vec<Identifier> for module path segment lists (ADR 1 D5 / D7).

NewTypeGraphCodecError.docs: Error type for Catalogue -> ExtendedCrate (TypeGraph A) codec (ADR 2 D9).

ParamName.docs: Newtype around Identifier for parameter names (ADR 1 D5).

Phase1Error.docs: Error for Phase 1 S/D construction (ADR 3 D2).

SelfReceiver.docs: Enum for MethodDeclaration receiver. 3 values (ADR 1 D8).

SignalRegion.docs: Enum encoding 12 variants for Phase 2 3-way evaluation regions (ADR 3 D3).

ThreeWayEvaluationReport.docs: Report produced by Phase 2 containing non-skip signals (ADR 3 D3).

ThreeWaySignal.docs: Signal result for one item in Phase 2 3-way evaluation (ADR 3 D3).

ThreeWaySignalKind.docs: Signal kind for Phase 2 3-way evaluation result (ADR 3 D3).

TraitImplDeclV2.docs: New trait implementation declaration: trait identity + optional generic args (ADR 1 D10). generic_args disambiguates multiple From<X> impls on the same type (e.g. thiserror #[from] variants). Display renders as TraitName<Args> or bare TraitName.

TraitName.docs: Newtype around Identifier for trait short names (ADR 1 D5).

TypeKindV2.docs: Language-level kind for TypeEntry. 5 flat variants: UnitStruct, TupleStruct, PlainStruct (with optional typestate marker), Enum, TypeAlias. Replaces old 3-variant form with nested CompositePattern (ADR 1 D3 / D7).

TypestateMarker.docs: Marks a PlainStruct as belonging to a typestate machine. state_name identifies the typestate enum/group; transitions lists methods that perform state transitions (ADR 1 D3).

TypestateTransitions.docs: Transition method names for a typestate state. Used inside TypestateMarker (ADR 1 D3).

TypeName.docs: Newtype around Identifier for type short names (ADR 1 D5).

TypeRef.docs: Newtype wrapping String for generics-inclusive type reference strings (ADR 2 D11).

VariantDecl.docs: Enum variant declaration: name (VariantName) and payload (VariantPayload) (ADR 1 D12).

VariantName.docs: Newtype around Identifier for enum variant names (ADR 1 D5).

LayerId.docs: Validated architecture layer identifier newtype (ADR 2026-04-17-1528 D1). Used as BTreeMap key in CatalogueLoader::load_all return type and as CatalogueDocument::layer field type.

CatalogueLinterRuleKind.docs: Existing enum of rule categories for CatalogueLinterRule. Domain counterpart of usecase LintRuleKind.

CatalogueLinterRule.docs: Existing value object representing one catalogue linter rule. Passed as &[CatalogueLinterRule] to CatalogueLinter::run.

CatalogueLintViolation.docs: Existing value object produced when a CatalogueLinterRule fires. Returned as Vec<CatalogueLintViolation> from CatalogueLinter::run.

CatalogueLinterError.docs: Existing error type for CatalogueLinter::run execution failures.

ContractMapRenderOptions.docs: Render-configuration value object for render_contract_map. Modified: removed stale kind_filter field (baseline was captured before T003 removed it); current shape is 4 fields + empty() associated function.

ConsistencyReport.docs: T008: deleted. Was part of consistency checking that depended on TypeGraph/TypeBaseline. Replaced by the 3-way evaluator.

ActionContradiction.docs: T008: deleted. Was raised by check_consistency when a catalogue action contradicted baseline. Replaced by Phase1Error::ActionContradiction in SignalEvaluatorV2.

ActionContradictionKind.docs: T008: deleted. Was the kind sub-enum for ActionContradiction. Replaced by Phase1Error string messages.

TypeGraph.docs: T008: deleted. TypeGraph (built from SchemaExport) replaced by rustdoc_types::Crate as the canonical code snapshot. SignalEvaluatorV2 operates on ExtendedCrate + rustdoc_types::Crate directly.

TypeNode.docs: T008: deleted. Was a node in TypeGraph for types. Replaced by rustdoc_types::Item in the new 3-way evaluator.

TraitNode.docs: T008: deleted. Was a node in TypeGraph for traits. Replaced by rustdoc_types::Item in the new 3-way evaluator.

FunctionNode.docs: T008: deleted. Was a node in TypeGraph for free functions. Replaced by rustdoc_types::Item in the new 3-way evaluator.

TraitImplEntry.docs: T008: deleted. Was a trait implementation record in TypeNode. Replaced by rustdoc_types::Impl items in ExtendedCrate.

TypeBaseline.docs: T008: deleted. TypeBaseline (rustdoc-based snapshot captured before a track) replaced by the baseline rustdoc JSON file. Baseline capture is now done by baseline_capture.rs directly.

TypeBaselineEntry.docs: T008: deleted. Was an entry in TypeBaseline for types. Replaced by direct rustdoc_types::Item access.

TraitBaselineEntry.docs: T008: deleted. Was an entry in TypeBaseline for traits. Replaced by direct rustdoc_types::Item access.

FunctionBaselineEntry.docs: T008: deleted. Was an entry in TypeBaseline for functions. Replaced by direct rustdoc_types::Item access.

TraitImplBaselineEntry.docs: T008: deleted. Was a trait implementation record in TypeBaselineEntry. Replaced by rustdoc_types::Impl items in ExtendedCrate.

CatalogueDocumentLoaderError.docs: Error type for CatalogueDocumentLoaderPort::load. Three variants: NotFound (file absent), Io (non-symlink I/O failure), Decode (JSON or schema-version failure from CatalogueDocumentCodec). [source: ADR 2026-05-11-2330 D2]

RustdocCratePortError.docs: Error type for RustdocCratePort methods. NotFound / Io cover baseline file load failures; ParseFailed covers JSON parse failures (from BaselineRustdocCodec::from_json); CaptureFailed covers cargo rustdoc invocation failures (from RustdocSchemaExporter::export_rustdoc_json_path). [source: ADR 2026-05-11-2330 D2]

TypestateTransitionsSpec.docs: Renamed from TypestateTransitions (Blocker 1): v1 catalogue spec representation of typestate transitions. Renamed to avoid short-name collision with catalogue_v2::TypestateTransitions struct.

TypeDefinitionKind.docs: v1 enum classifying type-catalogue entries by structural role (15 variants). Being phased out by IN-01 (TypeDefinitionKind 廃止). Modified: DomainService and FreeFunction variants added in this track as part of the v1→v2 migration; MethodDeclaration/ParamDeclaration migrated to v2 newtypes.

TdddLayerBinding.docs: Binding for a single TDDD-enabled layer resolved from architecture-rules.json. Contains layer_id, catalogue_file path, baseline_file path, and schema_export target crate names. Used by CatalogueImplSignalsInteractor without direct file I/O (hexagonal purity). [source: ADR 2026-05-11-2330 D2]

TdddLayerBindingsError.docs: Error type for TdddLayerBindingsPort::load. LoadFailed: architecture-rules.json unreadable or malformed. LayerNotFound: requested layer not found or not tddd.enabled. NoLayers: no enabled layers found. [source: ADR 2026-05-11-2330 D2]

CatalogueToExtendedCratePort.docs: Secondary port for Catalogue -> ExtendedCrate (TypeGraph A) conversion (ADR 2 D8).

CatalogueLinter.docs: Existing secondary port for running catalogue lint rules. Currently uses TypeCatalogueDocument; referenced for contract-map edge completeness.

ContractMapWriter.docs: Existing secondary_port for persisting contract-map content.

SchemaExporter.docs: Existing secondary_port for extracting public API of a crate as SchemaExport.

CatalogueLoader.docs: Existing secondary_port CatalogueLoader. Return type unchanged from v2 (TypeCatalogueDocument). The infrastructure adapter reads v3 CatalogueDocument files and converts them to TypeCatalogueDocument stubs via v3_doc_to_stub before returning; the V3StubConversion error variant surfaces when that conversion fails. Full v2-to-v3 port upgrade is deferred to a follow-up track.

SignalEvaluatorPort.docs: Secondary port for 3-way signal evaluator (Phase 1 + Phase 2) (ADR 3 D5).

CatalogueDocumentLoaderPort.docs: Secondary port for loading a CatalogueDocument from a filesystem path (A-side for CatalogueImplSignalsInteractor). Placed in domain alongside CatalogueToExtendedCratePort and SignalEvaluatorPort because CatalogueDocument is a domain type. The infrastructure adapter (FsCatalogueDocumentLoader) wraps CatalogueDocumentCodec::load. [source: ADR 2026-05-11-2330 D2 — hexagonal consequence of moving orchestration to usecase]

RustdocCratePort.docs: Secondary port for loading or capturing rustdoc_types::Crate instances. load_from_path covers the B-side (baseline file load); capture_current covers the C-side (live rustdoc capture via cargo +nightly rustdoc). Placed in domain alongside SignalEvaluatorPort because rustdoc_types::Crate is already used there (domain depends on rustdoc_types). The infra adapter (RustdocCrateAdapter) wraps BaselineRustdocCodec::load (B) and RustdocSchemaExporter::export_rustdoc_json_path + BaselineRustdocCodec::from_json (C). Replaces the direct infrastructure codec calls that were in apps/cli/three_way_signals.rs. [source: ADR 2026-05-11-2330 D2]

TdddLayerBindingsPort.docs: Secondary port for loading TDDD layer bindings from architecture-rules.json. Injected into CatalogueImplSignalsInteractor to keep architecture-rules.json parsing in the infrastructure layer. The infrastructure adapter (FsTdddLayerBindingsAdapter) wraps load_tddd_layers_from_path. [source: ADR 2026-05-11-2330 D2]

domain::tddd::catalogue_spec_signal::eva.docs: Evaluates the catalogue-spec confidence signal for one catalogue entry. Added an action: ItemAction parameter in this track (ADR 2026-05-11-1257 D5); the evaluator now factors in the entry action alongside spec_refs and informal_grounds.

domain::tddd::consistency::check_consist.docs: T008: deleted — depended on TypeGraph + TypeBaseline which are removed.

domain::tddd::signals::evaluate_type_sig.docs: T008: deleted — took TypeGraph as a parameter; replaced by SignalEvaluatorV2 which operates on rustdoc_types::Crate directly.

domain::tddd::signals::undeclared_to_sig.docs: T008: deleted — was part of old TypeGraph-based evaluation pipeline, no longer exported from domain lib.rs.

domain::tddd::signals::undeclared_functi.docs: T008: deleted — was part of old TypeGraph-based evaluation pipeline, no longer exported from domain lib.rs.
